user.title: Knob Swipe Navigation
user.description: Choose the ZHA rotary knob device and the dashboard it should control.

data_description.device_id: Only devices already provided by the ZHA integration can be used. Choose the rotary knob that emits rotate_type events.
data_description.dashboard_path: Use the first dashboard URL segment, for example lovelace or dashboard-home. Full dashboard URLs are also accepted.
data_description.navigation_enabled: Turn knob navigation on or off globally.
data_description.overlay_enabled: Show the tab overlay before moving tabs.
data_description.cooldown_ms: Ignore repeated rotations for this many milliseconds.
data_description.wrap_enabled: Move from the last tab to the first tab, and from the first tab to the last tab.
data_description.require_query_param: Optional. If set, only browser URLs containing this query parameter react.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Knob Swipe Navigation
reconfigure.description: Choose the ZHA rotary knob device and the dashboard it should control.

data_description.device_id: Only devices already provided by the ZHA integration can be used. Choose the rotary knob that emits rotate_type events.
data_description.dashboard_path: Use the first dashboard URL segment, for example lovelace or dashboard-home. Full dashboard URLs are also accepted.
data_description.navigation_enabled: Turn knob navigation on or off globally.
data_description.overlay_enabled: Show the tab overlay before moving tabs.
data_description.cooldown_ms: Ignore repeated rotations for this many milliseconds.
data_description.wrap_enabled: Move from the last tab to the first tab, and from the first tab to the last tab.
data_description.require_query_param: Optional. If set, only browser URLs containing this query parameter react.

error.not_zha_device: Select a device provided by ZHA.

abort.already_configured: Knob Swipe Navigation is already configured.

init.title: Knob Swipe Navigation options
init.description: Configure the dashboard and runtime behavior for knob navigation.

data_description.dashboard_path: Use the first dashboard URL segment, for example lovelace or dashboard-home. Full dashboard URLs are also accepted.
data_description.navigation_enabled: Turn knob navigation on or off globally.
data_description.overlay_enabled: Show the tab overlay before moving tabs.
data_description.cooldown_ms: Ignore repeated rotations for this many milliseconds.
data_description.wrap_enabled: Move from the last tab to the first tab, and from the first tab to the last tab.
data_description.require_query_param: Optional. If set, only browser URLs containing this query parameter react.

device_not_zha.message: The configured knob device is no longer provided by ZHA. Reconfigure Knob Swipe Navigation and select a ZHA device.

device_not_zha.title: Selected knob device is unavailable
device_not_zha.description: The configured knob device is not currently provided by ZHA. Open the Knob Swipe Navigation integration, start reconfiguration, and select a ZHA rotary knob device.
